description_long: This is a large, cylindrical red metal barrel with a flat, sealed top and bottom. The surface is slightly weathered, showing some scuffs and minor wear, suggesting it has been used or stored outdoors or in an industrial setting. The barrel features two prominent horizontal reinforcement bands encircling its body, providing structural strength. On one side, there is a diamond-shaped hazard label indicating the contents are flammable solids, which is typical for industrial chemical or fuel storage. The top of the barrel has two small, round, raised bungs for filling or emptying contents, but no visible handles. The overall appearance is robust and utilitarian, designed for heavy-duty use and safe containment of hazardous materials.
description: A large, red metal barrel with reinforcement bands and a flammable solids warning label, showing signs of wear and industrial use.
description_view_0: A red metal barrel with visible reinforcement bands and a plain, slightly worn surface; no labels or markings are visible from this angle.
description_view_1: The same red barrel, now showing a diamond-shaped flammable solids warning label on its side, along with the reinforcement bands.
description_view_2: A rear view of the barrel, similar to view 0, with no visible labels or markings, just the red surface and bands.
description_view_3: Another side view of the barrel, again showing only the red surface and reinforcement bands, with no visible labels.
attribute_banding_or_reinforcement: metal reinforcement rings at top, middle, and bottom
